gradient.$description: Deep Ocean light-mode gradient tokens. Primary and accent gradients are identical to dark mode; surface gradients use opaque navy/teal pastel tints for visibility on bright surfaces.

primary.$description: Primary gradient — same as dark: navy to cyan glow.

accent.$description: Accent gradient — same as dark: deep navy to light cyan.

surface.$description: Surface gradient — opaque light navy to light teal pastel. Visible on white/off-white surfaces.

surface-primary.$description: Surface gradient tinted with primary — blue spectrum light tints for primary-accented containers.

surface-accent.$description: Surface gradient tinted with accent — teal spectrum light tints for accent-accented containers.
